exam_name: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Field Service Functional Consultant

testing_centers.notes: Available at Certiport Authorized Testing Centers (primarily academic)

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name on ID must match registration. For online: webcam required, room must be clear of people and materials.
exam_rules: No notes, books, or study materials. No phones or smartwatches. Whiteboard or scratch paper may be provided by testing center. Online: no dual monitors, no virtual machines, no headphones, must be alone in a closed room.
renewal_options: Microsoft certifications (Associate/Expert/Specialty) are renewed annually for free via a short renewal assessment on Microsoft Learn. Renewal assessment available 6 months before expiry. Fundamentals certifications do not expire.
target_audience: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Field Service functional consultant
recommended_experience: Basic understanding of field service principles and the role the Field Service app plays in relationship to the Dynamics 365 suite of applications, including integration of Microsoft Power Platform, Dynamics 365 Customer Service, Microsoft 365 apps, Dynamics 365 Remote Assist, and Dynamics 365 Guides.

retake_policy.notes: No waiting period for first retake if score >= 500 on failed attempt. If score < 500: 14-day waiting period before retake. Maximum 5 attempts per exam per year (365 days). Free retake voucher sometimes included in official instructor-led training.

objectives.title: Configure core Field Service components
sub_objectives: Implement security for standard user groups
Configure territories, postal codes, and organizational units
Create and configure required product and service types
Configure minimum charge amounts and durations
Determine how pricing rules affect the price that is applied to a product on a work order
Associate products and services with price lists
Create and manage bookable resources, including frontline workers
Configure start and end locations for resources
Configure working hours and working hour templates
Configure and apply Requirement group templates
Set up resource pools and crews
Schedule and visualize pools, crews, and Requirement groups on the schedule board
Integrate other tools with Field Service
Implement Dynamics 365 Remote Assist for use with Field Service
Set up and use Dynamics 365 Remote Assist one-time call
Use Dynamics 365 Guides with work orders
Set up the Field Service Portal

domains.name: Manage work orders and customer assets

objectives.title: Configure the work order lifecycle
sub_objectives: Configure work order types and work order resolutions
Configure booking status and work order sub-status values
Add status and sub-status information to a work order
Organize work orders and resources by geography
Associate a work order with a price list, service-level agreement, and entitlement
Close a work order, including attaching a work order resolution
Create a work order by using Microsoft 365 Copilot in Outlook
Assign requirement group templates to incident types
Add products and services to incidents
Configure automatic generation of work orders
Associate inspections with work orders and customer assets
Configure products to enable automatic creation of customer assets

objectives.title: Manage scheduling options
sub_objectives: Schedule work orders by using the schedule board and schedule assistant
Configure resource requirements for multi-day scheduling
Configure, customize, and manage schedule boards
Configure and manage schedule boards, including customizing views
Enable scheduling for a table, including configuring the metadata
Configure geocoding for a custom table
Configure booking timestamps, booking journals, and actuals

domains.name: Manage the Field Service mobile app

objectives.title: Deliver work orders by using the mobile app
sub_objectives: Complete work orders, including tasks, booking statuses, follow-up work orders, signatures, images, and Field Service technician reports
Service and maintain customer assets, including IoT devices
Perform inspections, including adding ad hoc inspections
Launch related apps, including Dynamics 365 Remote Assist and Guides
Customize the mobile app including forms, views, pages, and navigation
Enable and configure location tracking and geofencing
Configure mobile offline profiles, online mode, and synchronization

domains.name: Manage inventory and purchasing by using the built-in inventory management system

objectives.title: Manage inventory and warehouses
sub_objectives: Manually update inventory by using inventory journals
Create a list of receivable products for a purchase order

objectives.title: Configure model-driven apps
sub_objectives: Create task-specific canvas apps and custom pages
Use Power Automate cloud flows to automate tasks and enhance Field Service

official_study_resources.title: Microsoft Learn (free self-paced training)
official_study_resources.notes: Free official learning paths mapped to each exam

official_study_resources.title: Microsoft Official Practice Assessment
official_study_resources.notes: Free official practice questions on Microsoft Learn

aliases: microsoft dynamics 365 field service functional consultant
